# Science

Using AI to increase the pace of scientific progress is a core part of Anthropic’s mission. Here, we’ll explore what this really looks like. We’ll share work happening inside and outside Anthropic, our collaborations with external researchers and labs, and practical workflows for scientists using AI in their research.

Science
